item.title: The Ultimate Pizza Challenge Begins!
item.description: A fun pizza challenge with a big, shareable pie and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food challenge for pizza fans.

media:content.media:title: The Ultimate Pizza Challenge Begins!
media:content.media:description: A fun pizza challenge with a big, shareable pie and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food challenge for pizza fans.

item.title: A Day Exploring Tumbling Creek
item.description: A simple day exploring Tumbling Creek in Tennessee, with a relaxed outdoor food-and-nature vibe.

media:content.media:title: A Day Exploring Tumbling Creek
media:content.media:description: A simple day exploring Tumbling Creek in Tennessee, with a relaxed outdoor food-and-nature vibe.

item.title: Do You Like Spicy Food?
item.description: A spicy food challenge from Da Garbage Disposal. Check out the full video and see if it was made!

media:content.media:description: A spicy food challenge from Da Garbage Disposal. Check out the full video and see if it was made!

item.title: $100 Little Caesars Time Challenge
item.description: A fun pizza challenge at Little Caesars with a $100 bet and a race against the clock.

media:content.media:title: $100 Little Caesars Time Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun pizza challenge at Little Caesars with a $100 bet and a race against the clock.

item.title: Cooking in the Wilderness Never Tasted This Good
item.description: A wilderness cooking moment with great flavor and a scenic outdoor setting. Simple, fun, and made for nature-loving food fans.

media:content.media:title: Cooking in the Wilderness Never Tasted This Good
media:content.media:description: A wilderness cooking moment with great flavor and a scenic outdoor setting. Simple, fun, and made for nature-loving food fans.

item.title: One Giant Reuben Challenge
item.description: A giant Reuben takes center stage in this fun food challenge, highlighting a big portion, classic flavors, and a playful competitive cooking vibe.

media:content.media:title: One Giant Reuben Challenge
media:content.media:description: A giant Reuben takes center stage in this fun food challenge, highlighting a big portion, classic flavors, and a playful competitive cooking vibe.

item.title: The Undefeated BBQ Challenge - 4 Pounds of Meat
item.description: A fun BBQ challenge featuring 4 pounds of meat and plenty of flavor. A hearty outdoor-style meal with a competitive twist.

media:content.media:title: The Undefeated BBQ Challenge - 4 Pounds of Meat
media:content.media:description: A fun BBQ challenge featuring 4 pounds of meat and plenty of flavor. A hearty outdoor-style meal with a competitive twist.
